name: @orrgal1/forge
description: PR forge chain — repo-agnostic. Forge resolves every operation through /forge-setup config (per-repo forge.toml tooling + the machine-global capabilities.toml registry). Repo tooling must be wired or it's NEEDS_SETUP; the generic agent capabilities carry built-in defaults. Forge works best with its single companion @orrgal1/devloop — the chain-blind PR ops (reviewer ranking and its siblings), the iteration loop, and the diagnostic toolkit — which it uses by default; the registry records only OVERRIDES. They're the default backing, so an un-overridden required cap whose default provider isn't installed halts that step → PROVIDER_MISSING (install the provider, or repoint via /forge-setup), preflighted at /forge + /forge-status entry. Restack is the lone exception with a built-in git fallback when unwired; configurable via /forge-setup [restack] (e.g. @orrgal1/devloop's /restack, a command/instructions). /forge drives start → goals → design → scenarios → tests → impl → proof-green → review-green → ci-green → ci-ready → READY (modes auto | manual | yolo — yolo drives with no contract pauses, stopping only at genuine blockers, via /forge-yolo; resume at any pause with a plain reply — "approved" advances, feedback iterates — or the explicit /forge approve and /forge iterate). The PR body stays tight: a non-collapsible brief on top (owned by /forge-brief, kept current as intent evolves) + each embedded chain artifact in its own idempotent collapsible block. Skills: /forge-setup (maps host-repo tooling into $FORGE_HOME, default ~/.claude/forge/<repo-key>/, so worktrees share state), /forge-start, /forge-brief, atoms (/forge-goals, /forge-scenarios, /forge-validations, /forge-tests, /forge-design, /forge-proof, /forge-review), per-layer attestation (/forge-verify-{goals,scenarios,tests,match,runs,validations}), fix-loops (/forge-impl-green — tests green + an always-on deslop pass over the diff (deslop capability, /deslop @orrgal1/devloop), /forge-proof-green, /forge-ci-green — restacks each iteration + runs --until-merge as a continuous background monitor after first green, replacing any final-ci step, /forge-review-green), external-block recognizer (find_blocker capability /find-blocker @orrgal1/devloop: fan out across gh/Slack/infra to identify a peripheral blocker + emit a neutral condition spec; /forge-wait-for: forge maps the spec to watch a base PR's CI, a Slack thread, or any predicate, then restack + resume when it clears — auto in yolo/unattended), author-review + peer-review watch + reviewer routing (on READY /forge arms /forge-review-watch to auto-address incoming peer feedback; the author self-reviews their own PR at a gated author-review step (AWAIT_AUTHOR_REVIEW, even in yolo) before peers, aided by /forge-author-review — a thin wrapper over the author_review capability (/author-review, @orrgal1/devloop) offering a goals-framed walkthrough of the diff + a manual-verification pass driven by the repo's manual_verify how-to (wired via /forge-setup), with each artifact embeddable as an idempotent collapsible body block — then the request_review capability (/request-review, @orrgal1/devloop) ranks the best peer reviewer; moving the PR out of draft to ready-for-review + requesting review is a gated author gesture, approval-required even in yolo), domain mapping (/forge-map: db/api/events/config/ad-hoc), multi-channel review (/forge-review: a thin chain wrapper over the `review` capability — default /review, @orrgal1/devloop — adding the proof gate, chain lenses, and forge verdict ladder), tool packaging (/forge-tool). The review engine + lens pool + channels + personas live in the review-capability provider; forge bundles only its three chain lenses (goal-delivery/scenario-realism/test-match), extensible per-repo via $FORGE_HOME/. Per-PR artifacts live in-repo under $FORGE_ART/branches/<slug>/ ($FORGE_ART = .forge by default, or <prefix>/.forge via [artifacts].prefix); git-tracking of that metadata is configurable via [artifacts].track (default all; categories spec[goals+design]/proof[machine state]/loop/review/monitor — track=["spec"] keeps only the review surfaces) enforced by a generated $FORGE_ART/.gitignore.
author: orrgal1
